positive: Minimalist geometric woodland scene, stylized linocut style, featuring silhouetted deer jumping over abstract stylized birch trees and ferns. The composition is perfectly centered and balanced, utilizing negative space to emphasize the clean shapes. High contrast black and white ink on a creamy background, with strategic pops of muted sage green and terracotta accents. Perfect for an apparel print, with crisp edges, clear lines, and bold graphic impact. Overhead flat lay composition, highly detailed vector graphic quality, clean edges, solid color blocking.
